title: rhododendron citrinum var. citrinum
intro: Rhododendron citrinum var. citrinum, also known as the Golden Azalea, is a flowering plant that belongs to the rhododendron family and is native to China and Taiwan. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Rhododendron citrinum var. citrinum include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. The plant is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
